nasb.text: The two and a half tribes have received their possession across the Jordan opposite Jericho, eastward toward the sunrising.”

esv.text: The two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan east of Jericho, toward the sunrise.”

cnv.text: 這兩個半支派已經在耶利哥對面，約旦河東岸，向日出之地得了產業。”

ccb.text: 这两个半支派的土地在耶利哥对面的约旦河东岸。”
